summary: ThreeDScene: unit Bloch sphere with basis-state markers |0⟩ (north), |1⟩ (south), |+⟩, |-⟩, |+y⟩. ValueTrackers theta_tr and phi_tr position a PURPLE state arrow + dot; always_redraw updates via cos(θ/2), sin(θ/2)e^(iφ) parametrization. Tour: |+⟩ → |+y⟩ → |1⟩ → general mid-state. Fixed-frame panel shows θ, φ, α, β.
